raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Removed the explicit .web(false) configuration from SpringApplicationBuilder, likely relying on default detection or a global property in the newer Spring Boot version.
Catch I2CFactory.UnsupportedBusNumberException alongside IOException to handle bus initialization errors during shutdown.
Remove unnecessary intermediate variable assignment to directly return the method result.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Remove the explicit .web(false) configuration from SpringApplicationBuilder to align with Spring Boot 2.4+ defaults where non-web applications are detected automatically.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the explicit .web(false) call from SpringApplicationBuilder to align with Spring Boot 2.4+ defaults where non-web applications are detected automatically.
Remove commented-out code line for setting device.
Translate error log message from German to English.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.human_impl: Changed `logger.error("Pushover Nachricht konnte nicht erstellt und versendet werden. ", e);` to `logger.error("could not create Pushover message. ", e);`

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Correct the text of the info log message to match the context or fix a typo.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.human_impl: Changed `logger.info("Pushover Nachricht wurde erfolgreich erstellt und versendet. {}", result.toString());` to `logger.info("could not create Pushover message: {}", result.toString());`

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Eclipse Paho MQTT client to version 1.2.5 to fix connection issues and ensure compatibility.
Upgrade Pi4J core library from 0.0.5 to 1.4 to access newer Raspberry Pi hardware interfaces.
Remove explicit Guava dependency as it is likely no longer directly used or is managed transitively.
Update Jackson Databind to 2.12.3 for security patches and feature updates.
Increment the project artifact version to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the major changes.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Eclipse Paho MQTT client from 1.1.0 to 1.2.5 to fix connection issues and ensure compatibility.
Upgrade Google API Services OAuth2 from v2-rev109-1.22.0 to v2-rev20200213-1.31.0 for updated API support.
Increment the project artifact version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT.
